flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY Hostos Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at CUNY Hostos Community College rose 21% between 2006 and 2009 (8.4% → 10.2%).
